requirement.title: Wire Run Detail page to /api/runs/[id]
requirement.description: Add a per-run detail endpoint that returns the full JSONL event stream plus an aggregated summary, and wire web/js/pages/run-detail.jsx to fetch it. Also extend SPA navigation so the dashboard can pass the clicked run id through to the detail page.

triage.notes: Read-only route; id regex blocks path traversal.

orchestrator.summary: 1 new route + 4 modifications; build green; smoke tests: valid id 200, invalid id 400, traversal attempt 400. Mocked Timeline/SLA cards removed in favor of honest empty/real state.
